title: Pi-ATAC Protocol for Single Cell Analysis
author: Xingqi Chen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q6gdzbw

steps.instruction: Remove PBS from dish, but keep on ice.
Add single cell dissociation solution to dish (for most tissues: 200 U/ml Collagenase in HBSS-FBS (1%)).
Try to pipet with 10 ml pipet, fill into 15ml tube.
Incubate 15 ml tube in 37°C incubator rotating (depending on amount and type of tissue). Undetermined, Incubation 00:15:00, Incubation
Spin down for 5 min at 1000 rpm. 00:05:00, Spin down
Use a glass Pasteur pipet to mechanically disrupt remaining clogs, transfer single cells to a 75µm strainer into a new tube (50 ml or 15 ml).
Count cells.
Aspirate supernatant.
Spin down desired amount of cells.
Add 2 ml HBSS –FBS (no collagenase) solution. HBSS – 1% FBS (no collagenase) solution Contributed by users undetermined, HBSS –FBS (no collagenase) solution
Resuspend in 100 µl PBS (for up to 200 000 cells). PBS Contributed by users undetermined, PBS
Fix cells for 10 min at RT using 100 µl 2%PFA. 2%PFA Contributed by users undetermined, 2%PFA 00:10:00, Fixing cells
Quench reaction using 1 volume Glycin (here 200 µl). undetermined, 1.25 M Glycerin Glycine, sodium salt Gold Biotechnology Catalog #G-450
Spin down.
Permeabilize cells using buffer containing 0.1% NP40, no incubation, immediately spin 5 min 1200 rpm. 00:05:00, Spin
If staining is desired: stain with antibodies here.
Spin down.

ATAC: (for 50,000 cells) 25 µl 2xTD, 22,5 µl H 2 O, 2.5 µl Tn5 → 30 min at 37 °C undetermined, 2xTD undetermined, H2O undetermined, Tn5 Undetermined 00:30:00 Nextera DNA library preparation kit 24 samples Contributed by users Catalog #FC-121-1030
Stop reaction by adding 40 mM EDTA: 500 mM Stock: 1:12.5 0.5M EDTA Contributed by users Catalog #AM92606
Spin down for 5 minutes at 1200 rpm. 00:05:00, Spin down
Resuspend in PBS – place on ice. PBS Contributed by users
Add Proteinase K 200µg/µl to reverse x-link buffer = 1:100 from 20 mg/ml Stock. Proteinase K Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #EO0491
quick-spin the plates to move all buffer to bottom
Set up single cell 96 or 384 well sort at a BD FACS AriaII or similar and in Diva software check index sort box.
If stained: measure controls (in bulk): e.g. unstained, FMO, uniquely stained samples. then measure and record fluorescence intensity.
Spin down plates immediately after sort.
Use heat sealer for sealing plates.
60°C reverse x-link O.N. (min 4 h) in incubator or PCR cycler. Undetermined, reverse x-link O.N. 04:00:00, reverse x-link O.N.
Inactivate Proteinease K for 10 min at 80°C. Undetermined, ProteinaseK inactivation 00:10:00, ProteinaseK inactivation

PCR: 100 wells/plate: per well: 25 µl NEBNext PCR MM, 2.5 µl Ad1, 2.5 µl Ad2 individual Primerstock concentration: 25 µM undetermined, NEB MM undetermined, Ad1 undetermined, Ad2 NEBNext High-Fidelity 2X PCR Master Mix - 250 rxns New England Biolabs Catalog #M0541L
Cycling conditions: %s %s 72°C 5min 98°C 30 s 98°C 10 s 20 cycles 63°C 30 s 72°C 1 min

Cleanup using MinElute vacuum: pool wells into a reservior, add PB (6ml /96 well plate) Wash with PE (10 ml/96well plate), spin down, elute in 12 µl EB per 96 well plate. undetermined, EB (per plate) MinElute Reaction Cleanup Kit Qiagen Catalog #28204
Library quantification using KAPA and BioAnalyzer. If required library cleanup using PAGE gel
If using tissue: take out tissue and put on 10 cm dish filled with 10 ml PBS on ice. Weigh
Prepare 96-well plates with 25 µl reverse x-link buffer per well. undetermined, reverse x-link buffer (per well)
Cut tissue in small pieces using a scalpel or razor blade on ice.
Please see the "before start" section of the Guidelines for buffers and solutions to prepare prior to start.
